title: Blogs
description: Deep dives on RTL design patterns, execution microarchitecture, verification methodology, EDA automation, and silicon-engineering best practices - written by practising engineers.

posts.title: Hazard-Aware Instruction Launcher
posts.excerpt: A decoded-instruction launch queue that keeps execution fed while screening register hazards, serializing memory traffic when required, and arbitrating eligible instructions through a clean ready-valid interface.

posts.title: High-Speed 64-bit Multiplier Architecture
posts.excerpt: A three-stage integer multiplier that combines odd-multiple precomputation, nibble-wide crossbar selection, and hierarchical accumulation to keep throughput high without dragging down clock speed.

posts.title: Formal Property Verification: From Assertions to Sign-off
posts.excerpt: Writing effective SVA properties for JasperGold and interpreting vacuity and unreachability results to achieve robust formal sign-off.

placeholderDescription: Additional posts on verification, automation, and embedded design are on the way.
